QF.id: VIII Introduction to Forwards and Futures_129

question.text: BSE Sensex futures contracts have a lot size of:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** BSE Sensex futures have a lot size of 20 as specified in the exchange's contract specifications. This is different from Nifty futures which uses a different lot size. BSE Sensex tick size is Rs. 0.05. **The Trap:** Different indices have different lot sizes. Don't assume all index futures have the same lot size. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract specifications are directly tested factual questions. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** BSE Sensex lot = 20. Nifty lot size has changed; check exchange website for current lot sizes.
